criteria.name: routine_step_crud_ux
criteria.description: Users can create, edit, delete, reorder, and manage routines and steps directly from the dashboard without navigation friction. Supports step name, duration, type (activity/rest), mobile-friendly inputs, and smooth interactions.

criteria.name: timer_engine_progress
criteria.description: Timer runs accurately, supports start, pause, resume, skip, and reset actions, automatically advances between steps, and clearly displays dual progress (current step and overall routine progress).

criteria.name: gamification_reward_loop
criteria.description: XP, level progression, streaks, best streak tracking, achievements, and visual progression are correctly calculated and updated immediately upon routine completion.

criteria.name: analytics_achievements
criteria.description: Dashboard provides clear weekly analytics, completion history, XP status, streak metrics, achievement unlock states, and meaningful progress visualization.

criteria.name: technical_reliability
criteria.description: Application persists data reliably using localStorage, survives reloads, restores state correctly, handles storage migration/versioning, and prevents data loss.

criteria.name: mobile_first_ux
criteria.description: Touch targets meet mobile accessibility standards, controls are thumb-zone optimized, typography is readable, contrast is accessible, interactions are responsive, and layouts remain stable without CLS issues.

orchestration_mode: Local controller implementation with multi-agent evaluation
